GridSFM Solver Pipeline Attribution
===================================

This directory contains a minimal copy of the GridSFM Julia topology solver,
export, scenario generation, and PyG verification pipeline needed by Tiangou-AI.

Source:

- Repository: GridSFM
- Original path: `power_grid/US/topology_solver_pipeline`
- License: MIT, copied in `LICENSE`

The files are vendored so Tiangou-AI can run the Hong Kong solver handoff without
requiring a sibling GridSFM checkout.
